description: Build packages/social-graph - Complete social graph engine with graph data structures, BFS traversal, friend suggestions, PageRank influence scoring, community detection, and privacy-aware graph operations
steps: Create packages/social-graph/src/types.ts with all type definitions: GraphNode (User/Page/Group), GraphEdge (follow/friend/block/mute), RelationshipStrength, InfluenceScore, Community, SocialCircle, PathResult, PaginatedResult, GraphEvent, NetworkGrowthMetrics, TrendingAccount

Create packages/social-graph/src/core/graph-store.ts - Core graph data structure using adjacency lists. Methods: addNode, removeNode, addEdge, removeEdge, getNeighbors, hasEdge, getNodeCount, getEdgeCount, getInDegree, getOutDegree. Privacy-aware traversal respecting blocks/mutes.

Create packages/social-graph/src/core/path-finder.ts - BFS shortest path between users, six degrees of separation calculation, mutual connections finder (set intersection of adjacency lists), friend-of-friend suggestions (2nd degree connections with deduplication)

Create packages/social-graph/src/core/influence-scorer.ts - PageRank-inspired algorithm: iterative computation with damping factor, convergence detection. Influence scoring based on follower count, engagement, content quality. Trending accounts detection (rapid follower growth, engagement spikes)

Create packages/social-graph/src/core/community-detector.ts - Label propagation algorithm for community detection. Social circle identification (close friends, acquaintances, professional contacts) using interaction frequency clustering. Relationship strength scoring (interaction frequency, recency, type weighting)

Create packages/social-graph/src/core/follower-manager.ts - Follow/unfollow operations with count tracking. Follower/following lists with pagination. Network growth tracking over time. Graph event processing (follow/unfollow triggers)
Create packages/social-graph/src/index.ts barrel export file exporting all classes and types
acceptance_criteria: packages/social-graph/src/index.ts exists and exports all public APIs
GraphStore supports add/remove nodes and edges with O(1) adjacency lookups
PathFinder implements BFS and returns shortest path between any two nodes
InfluenceScorer implements iterative PageRank with convergence
FollowerManager handles follow/unfollow with count updates
All implementations are 300-500 lines with real algorithms, not stubs
NODE_OPTIONS='' node scripts/test.js passes after adding social-graph to required packages
findings: All 7 files created successfully. graph-store.ts is 603 lines (slightly over 500 target but needed for full adjacency list implementation). Test runner passes with 23 packages validated. 2722 total lines in social-graph package.
